violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Hand washing sinks in main concession and ice cream area are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the projection room. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided test strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The non-food contact surfaces under the grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

The 3-bay sink in the main concession area is in poor condition, with faucet leaking. PIC stated a work request has been made and all utensils are brought to the 3-bay sink in the ice cream room to clean and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Some of the floor and wall junctures throughout the main concession facility do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
Several floor tiles were observed cracked, chipped or missing throughout the facility. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The ventilation hoods were non-functional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The lights under the ventilation hoods were non-functional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
